seoTitle: Evandale vs Evanston Gardens — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Evandale and Evanston Gardens. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Evandale vs Evanston Gardens: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Evandale and Evanston Gardens.
heading: Evandale vs Evanston Gardens — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Evandale, South Australia and Evanston Gardens, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Evanston Gardens has a lower overall climate risk score (34/100) compared to Evandale (41/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Evandale or Evanston Gardens safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Evandale has a flood risk score of 32/100, while Evanston Gardens scores 29/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Evandale scores 65/100 for bushfire risk. Evanston Gardens scores 20/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Evandale or Evanston Gardens?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Evanston Gardens has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.6% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
